comments.body:
Hi [~kerng] 

Pls create M2 for PCBA 70201941.

Thanks.

Hi [~wneo] 

MF1 structures are completed.

E5 level 1 released.

HI [~ceckl] 

There is phase in and out item for #216849 according to ECN 59583 which affected to #70155059. 

please advise if is new part are affected too. 

 
||Part Number PCBA||Type
Description|| ||
|#70201941|PCBA C USI-F264-IU3E5-V19| 8 ups|

HI [~kerng] 

Please create M2.

HI [~thhoang] 

FYI

HI [~nsaid] / [~asesuraj] 

Please fabricate stencil 

PO: 8001167005

cc: [~tmoghanan] [~alaung] [~harrytay] [~chonlim] [~rkrueger] [~deen] [~hayeo] [~sfernandez] [~ssenthivel] [~siti] [~gteo] [~mbaddah]

Hi [~siti] / [~thhoang] and all,

M2 is created for below part number, FYI.

Thank you.
||Part Number PCBA||Type
Description|| ||
|#70201941|PCBA C USI-F264-IU3E5-V19| 8 ups|

Hi [~ceckl] 

PCB 70200839 is under negotiation with supplier.

I would like to confirm whether parallel FAI for PCB is required .
Hi [~siti] regarding ECN59583 -> yes new part also affected, thank you.
Hi [~thhoang] I think standard process  includes the FAI for PCB. so please perform FAI.

Hi [~ceckl] 

I mean the {+}parallel FAI{+}, once PCB arrives our warehouse, small quantity will be released to SQM for the inspection, the remaining will be released to SMT for the build.

Parallel FAI is allowed for Qualification Sample, but in case you don't want it, we will wait until FAI is completed.
[~thhoang]  Thank you, didn't know. I don't need parallel FAI, you can wait for it.
Routing verified.

Hi [~ceckl] and [~tristl] 

I just got feedback from Purchasing Colleague that there is missing information about required quantity in AALX100for PCB #{*}70200839{*}, pls specify the quantity needed.

Estimated demand/year: 750 pc
*First sample qty (for tests): 0 pc*
Initial stock qty (after test): 0 pc
Preferred delivery date: 0

Because Yeng Leng, who is in charge of PCB ordering, is out of office, if you have any discussion via email with her, pls keep me in the loop, then I will forward to her backup.

Hello [~thhoang]  

please order 56 pcs. I updated also in table comment column above.
Stencils will be in delivered on the 2Dec2025

Hi [~ceckl] 

For the PCB, Layer drawing indicated Semi-Flex. Per feedback from supplier, this PCB will be built with depth milling but not Rigid-Flex. Pls confirm if this is acceptable?

[~ceckl] [~thhoang] 

Hi. This PCB should be a semi-flex. The supplier can go on to produce.

The supplier say, that the PCB will be built with depth milling. This is the same as Semi-flex. A FR4 material which is milling down on one area so that this FR4 is about 200µm thick.  You can’t bend it so often as a rigid-flex PCB (about 5x).

But it should be cheaper, because it is only FR4

Hi [~ceckl] [~tristl] [~wneo] 

We sent the feedback to supplier and now they are checking for material and production at their side, I will follow up and update again once we receive confirmed delivery schedule from them.

Hi [~thhoang] 

IMR:0020215973 have been raised

Hello [~ceckl] 

Supplier sent another EQ that need our review. Kindly check the attachment down below and give your feedback.

In case you cannot open the file, I also sent the EQ to you via email.

[~wneo] FYI, delivery for PCB 70200839 is not confirmed, item is still under EQ review.

Hello [~thhoang]  

Unfortunately I cannot evaluate this.

We have to wait for Thomas as he knows also the history of the former PCBA-versions.

[~tristl]  - Thomas please give feedback on this when you are back.

(flag) Flag added

Parked Project as RND is unavailable and will only be back on 7 jan. Once response is given we will proceed
[~harrytay]  kindly re-assign PE for SMT build

[~rkrueger] pls release this one from parked NPI. 

We received Feedback from RND for EQ of PCB #70200839, already sent to supplier.

Now waiting for supplier providing the confirmed delivery schedule.

[~ceckl] [~tristl] [~wneo] 

EQ is closed, supplier will produce and ship out the PCB on 6-Feb, *ETA 11-Feb.*

[~sheng] [~ykor] [~Alexia] [~rreyes] 

Dear SQM team 

We will have incoming delivery for *PCB 70200839 from supplier Sunshine , ETA 11-Feb.*

Upon PCB arrival, 24pcs will be sent to SQM for parallel FAI, the remaining balance of 80pcs will be released for production.

Pls note for preparation at your end.

[~sheng] [~ykor] [~Alexia] [~rreyes] 

Dear SQM team,

Regarding PCB 70200839 from Sunshine, supplier completed production and shipped the part earlier than initial schedule, *updated ETA 5-Feb.*

*Parallel FAI is applicable for this NPI.*

Hi [~wneo] [~kerng] 

PCB#70200839 booked-in. I'm expediting WH to complete put-away.

Varistor#192816 with stock available, waiting WH move back to MOPS1 location.

Remainder materials are available. Kindly note for your build schedule.

Hi [~wneo] [~kerng] 

PCB#70200839 and varistor #192816 have completed put-away under MOPS1 location. Kindly schedule the build to allocate #192816, as it may be consumed by other SNO MOs or transferred to CZ2.

[~thhoang] FYI.
changed qty to 24pcs due to array size

Hi [~kerng]  ,

 

Please proceed for Pilot Run MO planning of PCBAs shown below
|Item Number|Description|Qty|MO start|MO end|
|#70201941|PCBA C USI-F264-IU3E5-V19|24|9 Feb 26|13 Feb 26|

Please trigger [~abin]   for program creation

 

E5:

Released

!image-2026-02-06-09-19-09-364.png!

Depaneling required. 

Already in structure

 

Delivery: Will Collect (TO note to [~ceckl] )

IMR:0020215973 

 

[~fpangilina]  Please help to update HSCODE if it is not available

[~pauline]   Please help to update costing

Thank

 

FYI:  [~asesuraj] [~harrytay] [~deen] [~hayeo] [~sfernandez] [~gteo] [~tnynguyen] [~peckchoo] [~tmoghanan] [~wneo]  [~mzubir]
HS code updated, thanks.

HI [~wneo] 

MO is created, please refer to below.

 

Hi [~abin] 

Kindly help to create LES programme for the below MO, thank you.
|MO no     |Product        |P|St|Ho|St|R|Ref order |Ref ol|     Order qty |Str dt|Fin dt|Name                          |Resp      |
|*{color:#de350b}7003713399{color}*|70201941| |40|40|22| | |701|24|20226|130226|PCBA C USI-F264-IU3E5-V19|MP-3459|

[~kerng] Please help me change it to Qualification run not pilot

my mistake
Wiki link updated. Mainly alignment issue at T410 (6pcs) and T350 (7pcs).

[~tristl]  [~wneo] [~kerng] [~csertl] 

Hi all, what is the status of the Express Ops? 

I heard there are problems with the PCB ? PCB shall not be set to Status 20 because it needs evaluation, then PCBA evaluation if product production works.

Hi [~ceckl] 

build is already completed, sending the boards out today via express. TO:145542

Side A:  AOI detected x1 Lead Coplanarity NG and x1 Lead Pad Overhang NGs on T350.
Side B:  AOI detected x1 Body Pad Overhang NG on N423.

Will perform further fine tuning on pilot run to address "Missing" false calls detected on C301 and C351.

No other major AOI issues detected on sides A and B.
